nasb.text: And the wall of the city had twelve foundation stones, and on them were the twelve names of the twelve apostles of the Lamb.

esv.text: And the wall of the city had twelve foundations, and on them were the twelve names of the twelve apostles of the Lamb.

cnv.text: 城牆有十二座根基，根基上有羊羔的十二使徒的名字。

ccb.text: 城墙共有十二块基石，基石上刻着羔羊的十二位使徒的名字。

csbs.text: 城墙有十二座基石，上面有羔羊十二使徒的十二个名字。
